name: Ameren Corp
description: Ameren Corporation is an American power company created December 31, 1997, by the merger of St. Louis, Missouri's Union Electric Company (formerly NYSE: UEP) and the neighboring Central Illinois Public Service Company (CIPSCO Inc. holding, formerly NYSE: CIP) of Springfield, Illinois. It is now a holding company for several power companies and energy companies.
address: 1901 CHOUTEAU AVENUE, SAINT LOUIS, MO, UNITED STATES, 63103
